meta.notes: FULL RUN — all stages executed including Stage 2 (Gemini assets), Stage 3 (Gemini keyframes), Stage 3.6 (MiniMax music), Stage 4 (Kling video, 4 batches). No lipsync (no dialogue shots — sfx_hint only). Tested latest skill version on feat/short-film branch (commit c9ee2aa) with new Stage 2.5 script preview and Stage 3.5 keyframe review interactive checkpoints. Two bugs discovered and fixed during run: (1) keyframes.py used hardcoded PikaBot subprocess path — replaced with direct HTTP Gemini API; (2) music.py/lipsync.py missing from repo — copied from working Downloads copy; (3) get_sender_headers missing from nova3_common/config.py — added no-op stub. Project ID: film_20260415_2d271d.

test_input.name: creative-brief-horror
test_input.description: Horror/thriller creative brief: Ji-yeon (22yo Korean exchange student) breaks into abandoned university library, encounters ghost. 12 shots, portrait 9:16, cold noir style.

task.name: short-film
task.purpose: Generate a complete ~60s horror short film from a 7-question creative brief: plan, assets (Gemini), keyframes (Gemini), music (MiniMax), Kling video (4 batches concurrent), music mix
task.expected_output: Portrait 9:16 MP4 (~60s) with Kling-generated video, per-shot SFX audio, and background horror score, uploaded to CDN

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/nova3-agent-skills/short-film/

asset_acquisition.notes: No test input to download — input is a text creative brief only.

steps.name: plan
steps.notes: Stage 1: write_plan() called directly — story bible + 12 shots written as JSON. ~0.1s.

steps.name: script_preview
steps.notes: Stage 2.5: script presented to user for confirmation (new interactive stage). Wall time includes user review — not measured as tool time.

steps.name: assets_gemini
steps.notes: Stage 2: Gemini flash image preview. 2 character portraits + 3 scene images in parallel (5 workers). 137s total.

steps.name: keyframes_gemini
steps.notes: Stage 3: Gemini individual calls per shot (9:16). 12 shots sequential. 1 timeout (shot_08, 504) — retried successfully. ~289s. Bug fixed during run: subprocess → HTTP API.

substeps.name: keyframe_generation
substeps.notes: 11 shots in first pass, 1 retry for shot_08 timeout

steps.name: keyframe_review
steps.notes: Stage 3.5: 12 keyframes presented to user for confirmation (new interactive stage). Wall time includes user review — not measured as tool time.

steps.name: music_minimax
steps.notes: Stage 3.6: MiniMax music-2.5. 56.4s horror underscore. 74s total (ran sequentially after video due to missing music.py — in production should run in parallel with Stage 4).

steps.name: video_kling
kling_upload_keyframes
steps.notes: 12 keyframes uploaded to CDN (2 concurrent workers)

steps.name: kling_poll_all_batches
steps.notes: Polling every 30s, 4 batches concurrent. All completed between poll #9 and #12 (~360s)

steps.name: kling_download_assemble
steps.notes: Download 4 MP4s, normalize PTS, ffmpeg concat. final_video_only.mp4 at 54.2s.
Stage 4: Kling v3 omni, 4 batches (B1-B4), all submitted and polled concurrently.

steps.name: lipsync_mix
steps.notes: Stage 4.5: No lipsync (sfx_hint only). Music mix via ffmpeg + CDN upload. 12s total.

execution.notes: execution.total_s = wall_total_s (1772s). skill_run_s = sum of timed tool steps (0.1+0.1+137+289+74+505+12 = 1017s). llm_overhead_s = wall_total_s - skill_run_s = 1772-1017 = 755s (includes Stage 2.5 and 3.5 user review wait time + LLM thinking + bug investigation/fixes).

delivery.notes: CDN upload embedded in lipsync.py (Stage 4.5). Counted in execution.total_s.

tokens._note: Extracted via extract-cc-tokens.py --after 2026-04-15T07:19:14Z --before 2026-04-15T08:05:19Z. 102 messages matched. effective_input_tokens=12551598.

totals._note: llm_overhead includes Stage 2.5 script review, Stage 3.5 keyframe review, and in-session bug investigation. Pure tool time (no user pauses, no bug fixes) ~1017s.
